revision.text:
[[ja:本坊山古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |name = Honbōyama Kofun |image = [[File:本坊山古墳出土 陶棺.JPG|280px]]
Tōkan (exhibited at the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|en|Tokyo National Museum|qid=Q653433|lt=Tokyo National Museum|1=Tokyo National Museum}}) |alternate_name = Yamazaki No. 7 Kofun | part_of = Katsurayama-Hatayama Kofun Cluster |location = {{ill|Setouchi|qid=Q691691|1=Setouchi, Okayama}} |coordinates = 34.685333 |coordinates = 134.137714 |omitted = JP-33 |type = {{ill|Round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |size = |burial = Unknown (contains a Sue-type house-shaped tōkan) |excavated_burial goods = |satellite_kofun = |built = Late 7th century |interred_persons = |mausoleum = |historic_sites = None |tangible_cultural_properties = |notable_features = Excavation of tōkan with double-petaled lotus design |map = Japan Okayama |type = Round tumulus |map_dot_label = Honbōyama Kofun |map_dot_label = top }} '''Honbōyama Kofun''' (本坊山古墳, also known as Yamazaki No. 7 Kofun) is a {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|qid=Q1141225|lt=kofun (tumulus)|1=Kofun}} located in Higashisue, Osafune-cho, {{ill|Setouchi, Okayama|en|Setouchi, Okayama|qid=Q691691|lt=Setouchi, Okayama|1=Setouchi, Okayama}}, {{ill|Okayama Prefecture|en|Okayama Prefecture|qid=Q132936|lt=Okayama Prefecture|1=Okayama Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|round tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/round tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and is part of the Katsurayama-Hatayama Kofun Cluster. It is not Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == The Honbōyama Kofun was constructed at the southeastern end of a ridge extending eastward from Katsurayama in southeastern Okayama Prefecture. Most of the tumulus mound has been leveled over time{{Sfn|Honbōyama Kofun (Heibonsha)|1988}}{{Sfn|Honbōyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}}. While the exact type of the tumulus is unclear, it is presumed to be circular{{Sfn|Honbōyama Kofun (Heibonsha)|1988}}. Although the burial facility is unknown, a Sue-type house-shaped tōkan with a kirizuma-style roof has been identified among the excavated burial goods{{Sfn|Honbōyama Kofun (Heibonsha)|1988}}{{Sfn|Honbōyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}}. This tōkan is notable for having clay plates with a double-petaled lotus design, similar to roof tile designs, affixed to its gable sides. This characteristic highlights the interaction between late kofun culture and Buddhist influences, making it a unique example{{Sfn|Honbōyama Kofun (Heibonsha)|1988}}{{Sfn|Honbōyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}}. The kofun is estimated to have been built in the late 7th century during the terminal phase of the {{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|qid=Q459939|lt=Kofun period|1=Kofun period}}. The excavated tōkan is currently preserved at the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|en|Tokyo National Museum|qid=Q653433|lt=Tokyo National Museum|1=Tokyo National Museum}}. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|ref=harv|title=Japanese Historical Topography Series: Okayama Prefecture|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=Honbōyama Kofun|publisher={{ill|Heibonsha|en|Heibonsha|qid=Q11482108|lt=Heibonsha|1=Heibonsha}}|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|Honbōyama Kofun (Heibonsha)|1988}}}} * {{Cite book|ref=harv|title=Encyclopedia of Infobox ancient site|editor=|author=Takashi Mamoru|year=1989|chapter=Honbōyama Kofun|publisher={{ill|Tokyodo Shuppan|ja|東京堂出版|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyodo Shuppan|1=Tōkyōdō Shuppan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11524645}}|isbn=4490102607|ref={{Harvid|Honbōyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}}}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|本坊山古墳|version=91583855|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:本坊山古墳]] {{wikidata link|Q109360232}} [[Category:History of Setouchi, Okayama]] [[Category:Kofun of Okayama prefecture]] [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]
